title: Myprotein × Stampfree — interactive post-purchase demo
coach: This is an interactive demo 👉 choose options to continue

chapters.h2: “Your Myprotein order is on its way, Aisha!”
chapters.p: The journey opens proactively on dispatch — the customer can redirect the parcel before it even arrives: a pick-up point or a different day.
chapters.val: Why it matters: every delivery becomes a conversation, not a dead-end tracking page.

chapters.h2: A map of nearby collection points
chapters.p: Choosing a pick-up point shows local shops on a map. Pick one and the chat confirms the address and opening hours before continuing.
chapters.val: Fewer failed deliveries: the customer self-selects a convenient, attended location.

chapters.p: At the shop the customer shows their collection QR at the till and taps Collected — closing the delivery loop entirely inside the thread.
chapters.val: No separate app: proof-of-collection lives right inside WhatsApp.

chapters.p: After delivery the brand checks in. One tap routes happy customers to a review and unhappy ones straight into a return — capturing sentiment at the perfect moment.
chapters.val: Reviews & returns handled in the same place feedback naturally happens.

chapters.p: Right after a positive interaction, a time-boxed offer appears. Shop Sale opens myprotein.com in a new tab and keeps the conversation going — no dead ends.
chapters.val: Repeat revenue: the highest-intent moment is right after a good experience.

chapters.h2: Upload a photo, get a tailored response
chapters.p: Not in this demo yet — the upload-and-respond AI hook (shown in the Crocs build) plugs in here as a next step for Myprotein.
chapters.val: Roadmap: the same flow can power AI product recommendations or personalised plans.
